title: YTP: Old YTPer Hates Old Fashioned YTPs
description:
Heres a YTP of a YTPer I started in Valentines Day 2015. (yay)

I wanted to finish it earlier but because the YTPer in this video (@MoBrosStudios ) was dealing with some life problems, I decided to stop the project.

But after he uploaded a video (around December 2017) about his way to recovery, I decided to finish it after finding the file in my computer in 2018.

Link to MoBrosStudios channel:
https://www.youtube.com/user/MoBrosStudios/videos
And his recovery video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XfqP_2aftxo

Also this video is very sarcastic. post spaghettiteadinner if you read all of this
